reasoning: Zootopia 2 is highly anticipated but faces two major hurdles to having the highest opening weekend of 2025. First, it releases on a Wednesday (the day before Thanksgiving), which splits its opening audience across five days and naturally depresses its 3-day weekend gross relative to traditional Friday releases. Second, it faces immense competition from major blockbusters in 2025, notably 'Avatar: Fire and Ash', 'Jurassic World: Rebirth', and 'Superman', which are more likely to have colossal 3-day openings. Given these factors and a market price of around 7%, a low probability is appropriate.
